course_title: SOCIAL MARKETING CAMPAIGNS IN SCIENCE, HEALTH AND THE ENVIRONMENT
description: Design, production and evaluation of communication programs aimed at informing and educating the public about agricultural, environmental, science, health and human ecology issues.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Senior standing, declared in Life Sciences Communication,LSC 250and251

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Senior standing, declared in Life Sciences Communication,LSC 250and251
